status_label: OBSERVATIONAL ONLY — measures the book; changes nothing.
verdict: Reasonably broad — profit is spread across multiple names.
what: How concentrated the crypto edge is — per-symbol, with the top name removed.
why: A single good name can fake a system edge. This shows whether the edge is broad or narrow.
honest_note: Lifetime crypto account book, real fills only. 'pct_of_net' can exceed 100% when one name's profit is larger than the net (because other names lost). No synthetic data.
